topics.title: Artie's Relationship Status and Viacom Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie’s personal relationship struggles with Dana, his upcoming appearance on "Meet the Better Half," and his ongoing professional grievances regarding Viacom's management of his syndication.

topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Relationship Struggles
topics.summary: The studio explores the challenges of maintaining a free-flowing radio show amidst heavy commercial requirements while discussing personal relationship struggles involving commitment, alcohol, and the pressures of fame.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Celebrity Guest Previews
topics.summary: The studio discusses personal relationship boundaries, the upcoming appearances of guests like Donald Trump and Hulk Hogan, and the logistics of guest coordination.

topics.title: Billy Joel Concert Experience
topics.summary: The studio discusses the setlist and performance of Billy Joel at a recent concert, highlighting his musical range and specific hits like "Goodnight Saigon" and "New York State of Mind."

topics.title: Vending Machine Inventory and Logistics
topics.summary: The studio interviews a vending machine technician to discuss the logistics of restocking popular items like cupcakes and the impact of high-volume consumption on inventory management.

topics.title: Dancing with the Stars and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various television personalities, including Stacey Keibler, Lisa Renner, and Master P, while critiquing recent episodes of Dancing with the Stars and American Idol.

topics.title: Donald Trump Discusses The Apprentice and Family Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio hosts Donald Trump, who discusses the success of his television show, his professional rivalry with Martha Stewart, and his relationship with his children.

topics.title: Ivanka Trump Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Ivanka Trump regarding her education at Wharton, her role in the family business, her relationship with Martha Stewart, and her upcoming appearance on The Apprentice.

topics.title: Joan Rivers and Trump Family Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Joan Rivers reacts to a clip of her past confrontation with a man, followed by a discussion regarding the Trump family and their public image.

topics.title: Joan Rivers' Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Joan Rivers discussing her charitable work, her experiences with the television industry, and personal anecdotes regarding her relationships and public image.

topics.title: Joan Rivers and Production Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses Joan Rivers' upcoming appearances, a dispute over unpaid comedy jokes, the relocation of an inmate to a mental facility, and preparations for upcoming segments involving celebrity interviews.

topics.title: Media Censorship and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the nuances of broadcast standards regarding sex talk, the personal recovery journey of Jeff Conaway, and various anecdotes involving rock stars and action cinema.

topics.title: Identity Experiments and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a prank phone call involving a voice modulator, the impact of personal identity on music perception, and the cultural implications of language barriers in public spaces.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including celebrity news regarding Anna Nicole Smith, sports figures like Muhammad Ali, legal issues involving the Gotti family, and corporate reports on H&R Block and port ownership.

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Celebrity Deaths
topics.summary: The show covers escalating violence in Iraq, potential threats to Saudi oil fields, the end of Saddam Hussein's hunger strike, and the passing of actors Don Knotts and Richard Bachman.
